entry.title: Bill 94 (Hawaiʻi County): — → Passed Second Reading
entry.content:
AMENDS ORDINANCE NO. 25-45, AS AMENDED, THE OPERATING BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF HAWAIʻI FOR THE FISCAL YEAR ENDING JUNE 30, 2026

Increases revenues in the Federal Grants – Emergency Solutions Grants Program account ($4,045)

Status: — → Passed Second Reading

Latest action: Council: Bill 94 passes second & final reading - 11/19/25

View on the council site

entry.title: New: Bill 94 (Hawaiʻi County) — On agenda 2025-11-19
entry.content:
AMENDS ORDINANCE NO. 25-45, AS AMENDED, THE OPERATING BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF HAWAIʻI FOR THE FISCAL YEAR ENDING JUNE 30, 2026

Increases revenues in the Federal Grants – Emergency Solutions Grants Program account ($4,045)
